title: AGP Context State
description: An agent's accumulated planning context: capability announcements and subjective observations of action paths. Exchanged during anti-entropy reconciliation. Rank is computed locally and has NO wire representation.

agent.description: Identifier of the agent whose context state this is.

version.description: Monotonic state version / logical clock for this agent.

capabilities.description: Capability announcements known to this agent.

observations.description: Observations known to this agent. Provenance (observer, observedAt) MUST be preserved; observations from different observers MUST NOT be merged.

$comment: Deferred: a 'presence' collection for user-presence context will be added by a future SEP once privacy requirements (spec/security.md section 8) are resolved.

actionPath.title: Action Path
actionPath.description: A means of accomplishing a task: an external agent application, an inherent skill, or an MCP server.

id.description: Stable identifier for this path. MUST be stable across restarts so observations accumulate meaningfully. TODO: define format.

address.description: Endpoint/address for 'agent' and 'mcp' kinds. TODO: define representation.

capability.title: Capability Announcement
capability.description: A declared function offered by an action path. Agents MUST only announce paths they control.

id.description: Unique identifier of this capability announcement (referenced by 'withdraw').

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live from announcedAt. Receivers MUST discard expired announcements. TODO: define default.

observation.title: Observation
observation.description: A timestamped, SUBJECTIVE report by one agent about one action path. Receivers MUST treat this as a claim by its observer, not fact.

observer.description: Identifier of the observing agent. MUST be preserved when the observation is forwarded.

observedAt.description: Time of observation (RFC 3339). MUST be preserved when forwarded.

metrics.description: Optional quantitative measurements backing the status.

ttlSeconds.description: Time-to-live from observedAt. Receivers MUST discard expired observations. TODO: define default.
